top_signals.title: Companies Rush to Borrow Cash as US-Iran Deal Spurs Bullish Mood
top_signals.summary: US companies looked to offload more than $40 billion of debt in the credit markets on Monday, as they tried to capitalize on investor optimism after the US and Iran reached a tentative agreement to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SpaceX Will See Strong Natural Demand: Guild
top_signals.summary: Robinhood CIO Stephanie Guild discusses the retail demand for SpaceX shares with Bloomberg's Matt Miller and Dani Burger on "Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: SpaceX Jumps 16% in Second Day of Trading After Record IPO
top_signals.summary: SpaceX shares jumped in their second day of trading, adding to gains following a blockbuster debut that instantly vaulted it into the ranks of the world’s most valuable public companies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
